title: Employee Standards of Conduct: Searches and Alcohol/Drug Testing
description: Conroe ISD outlines the conditions under which employees may be subject to searches of their belongings or workplace property, as well as when alcohol and drug testing can be required. The district uses these measures to help ensure that staff members remain fit for duty and that schools stay safe environments for students. Parents and community members can look to this policy to understand the safeguards in place to address potential substance use among district employees.
